_note: Updated daily at noon by the QA agent. Plain language — no jargon.

release_gate.label: No release in flight
release_gate.description: Tools are in active development. No public release is being prepared right now, so the release gate is not formally open. When a release is in flight, this will show a clear go or no-go.

test_suite.notes: All runnable tests passing. One test file can't be run due to a missing module path — it exists but the test runner can't find the code it's testing.

coverage_gaps.area: Room editor — placing and moving things on the canvas
coverage_gaps.gap: No automated tests for the actual canvas interaction. If drag-and-drop placement breaks, nothing will catch it automatically.
No test that a saved room opens back to exactly the same state it was saved in. This is the most important thing to get right for game production.
No test that an AI suggestion, once accepted, actually updates the room correctly. We're trusting this works without checking.
Everything is tested on Chrome. The canvas drawing code can behave differently in Safari and Firefox. We haven't checked.
No screenshot comparison tests. A visual change to a button or panel won't be caught automatically.

priorities.title: Fix the one test file that can't run — the room environment tests
priorities.note: One test file exists but fails to load because the code it's testing isn't being found. The tests may be perfectly good — they just need a path fix to run.

priorities.title: Write a save/load round-trip test — save a room, reload it, confirm nothing changed
priorities.note: This is the single most valuable test we could add. If a room saves and reloads identically every time, we know the most critical production path is solid.

priorities.title: Test the AI room assistant end to end — ask it to generate, accept the result, check the room
priorities.note: The AI Copilot is a key feature and nothing currently checks that accepting a suggestion actually does what it should. Needs to be automated before any release.

priorities.title: Check the tools work properly in Safari and Firefox
priorities.note: Canvas drawing behaves slightly differently between browsers. Before any public release we need to confirm the tools work in all three major browsers.

priorities.title: Set up a basic automated browser test to run before each release
priorities.note: Currently all browser testing is manual. A small set of automated 'open the tool and check it loads' tests would catch the worst regressions instantly.

risks_p1.title: Saving and loading rooms has no automated safety net
risks_p1.note: A bug in room saving could corrupt work silently. This is the highest-value test gap to close.

risks_p1.title: AI Copilot accept flow is untested
risks_p1.note: We can't confidently release the AI room assistant without a test that confirms the accept/apply path works end to end.
